vision_statement: Compress urban geography into macro-planetary nodes, automating extraction and risk mitigation via an autonomous agentic workforce. One Sovereign Core. Zero human dependency for digital work.

commander.title: Sovereign Core
commander.role: Intent only — keys, nuclear, public brand

core_orchestrator.purpose: FastAPI command pipeline — intent engine, doctrine, velocity, routing to portal and voice OS.

quantum_telemetry_layer.purpose: External API interfaces (Vapi bridge, n8n, GHL, Servury). QRNG/quantum stubs when treasury clears.

agentic_workforce_factory.purpose: AutoGen, LiveKit, Skyvern workers — scrape, analyze, operate without human friction.

synthetic_council_core.purpose: Empire research + A2A resolver — digital work before humans; council expands with treasury.

human_firewall.purpose: Physical/judgment walls only — guardians + RentAHuman. Commander not notified.

planetary_nodes.purpose: Sovereign Stay, expansion, KC blitz — cities as planetary nodes, 3 units each.

macro_starmap_hud.purpose: Command deck UI — tasks, treasury, escalations, nuclear queue.

sovereign_vault.purpose: Doctrine, will manifest, acquisition manifest, Obsidian sync.

biometric_twin_telemetry.purpose: Commander optimization data — future multi-omics ingest.
